+%% fixture_id: journey_dense_actors
+%% purpose: dense actor participation + long labels (wrapping/layout stress)
+journey
+  title Incident Response Drill
+  section Detect
+    Alert triggers in monitoring pipeline: 4: OnCall, SRE, Security
+    Triage and label incident in tracker: 3: OnCall, Manager, Scribe
+  section Mitigate
+    Roll back deployment and confirm recovery: 2: OnCall, SRE, ReleaseEng, QA
+    Post update to stakeholders channel: 5: Manager, Comms, Security
+  section Learn
+    Write postmortem and action items: 4: SRE, Manager, OnCall, Scribe
+
